subject: ata: pata_octeon_cf: Fix refcount leak in octeon_cf_probe
notes: Reused features.json, seed.c, poc.c, poc-db from lin-5-rep1 (POC sha256 verified, no drift).
POC contains only single _buggy variant; oracle satisfied since no _fixed/fp variants present to false-positive on.
Plan decomposed into 3 predicates: isAcquire (of_find_device_by_node), isRelease (put_device), hasMissingRelease (acquire without put_device anywhere in enclosing function).
All predicates passed validation on first iteration; final query compiled and ran with expected oracle outcome.
